task: put the ring on the purple spoke
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A purple cylinder stands on a wooden table. A blue ring is on the table to the right of the cylinder. The cylinder is rigid with a circular top; the ring is a small, flat object. STRATEGY - First, grasp the ring. Then, transport it to the top of the cylinder. Finally, place the ring on the cylinder's top. Failure modes include dropping the ring during transport or misaligning it on the cylinder. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the ring at its center for stable grasp; Step 2 grasp the ring for secure hold; Step 3 transport the ring to the cylinder's top; Step 4 place the ring on the cylinder's top.

Goal: on(ring, purple_cylinder)
Scene: purple_cylinder, ring, table
Step 1: reach(ring)
  affordance_region: the center of the blue ring
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, ring, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, ring) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(ring)
  affordance_region: the center of the blue ring
  contact: holding(ring) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(ring)
Step 3: transport(ring -> purple_cylinder)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the purple cylinder
  spatial: above(ring, purple_cylinder, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(ring)
  done_when: above(ring, purple_cylinder, 0.05)
Step 4: place(ring -> purple_cylinder)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the purple cylinder
  contact: surface_contact(ring, purple_cylinder) [completion]; released(ring) [completion]
  pose: on(ring, purple_cylinder) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(ring, purple_cylinder) AND released(ring)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the center of the blue ring
the center of the blue ring
the top surface of the purple cylinder
the top surface of the purple cylinder
